info.name: Stytch Management API
info.description:
Stytch's Management API for programmatic workspace actions — projects, environments, secrets, redirect URLs, RBAC policies, JWT templates, email templates, event log streaming, trusted token profiles, public tokens, and SDK configuration.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stytch Support
 Email: support@stytch.com
